name: 龍蝦通用核心飼料 (L0)
description: 所有龍蝦代理的基礎出廠設置。定義核心身分、專業語調與標準思維邏輯，適用於任何場景。
description_en: The baseline factory setting for all Lobster agents. Defines core identity, professional tone, and standard reasoning logic for any scenario.

name: 龍蝦確定性代理框架
description: 為複雜決策實施嚴格的邏輯分支與可重複執行路徑，確保執行的一致性。
description_en: Implements strict logical branching and repeatable execution paths for complex decision-making, ensuring consistency.

name: 反幻覺邏輯護欄
description: 實施多層交叉驗證，消除 AI 輸出中的事實錯誤與無根據聲明。
description_en: Implements multi-layer cross-validation to eliminate factual errors and unfounded claims in AI outputs.

name: 工具驅動狀態機
description: 將代理邏輯轉化為穩健的狀態機，由特定工具輸出與傳感器數據驅動。
description_en: Transforms agent logic into robust state machines driven by specific tool outputs and sensor data.

name: 自主研究代理
description: 端到端的多源數據收集、綜合與報告生成，無需人工干預。
description_en: End-to-end multi-source data collection, synthesis, and report generation without human intervention.

name: AI SEO 內容工廠
description: 利用關鍵字優化、高權威性的技術指標與文章，實現大規模內容生產。
description_en: Scales content production using keyword optimization and high-authority technical metrics.

name: 聯盟行銷自動化
description: 自動化產品分析、連結生成與多通路內容分發，優化轉化率。
description_en: Automates product analysis, link generation, and multi-channel content distribution to optimize conversion rates.

name: 軟體專案架構代理
description: 根據架構說明書自動搭建、實施並記錄完整的軟體模組。
description_en: Automatically builds, implements, and documents complete software modules based on architectural specs.

name: 代碼除錯代理
description: 自動化追蹤分析、錯誤定位與關鍵任務系統的修正更新。
description_en: Automates trace analysis, bug localization, and corrective updates for mission-critical systems.

name: 文檔自動生成器
description: 從源代碼中提取邏輯模式，生成全面的 API 參考與系統導覽。
description_en: Extracts logical patterns from source code to generate comprehensive API references and system guides.

name: 市場研究自動化
description: 即時監控市場趨勢、消費者情緒與宏觀經濟指標。
description_en: Real-time monitoring of market trends, consumer sentiment, and macroeconomic indicators.

name: 競爭情報代理
description: 自動化監控與分析競品功能差距與策略轉型。
description_en: Automates monitoring and analysis of competitor feature gaps and strategic pivots.

name: 數據採集代理
description: 分佈式爬蟲與 API 整合器，用於大規模結構化數據提取。
description_en: Distributed crawlers and API integrators for large-scale structured data extraction.

name: 多代理協作調度員
description: 調度專業化子代理之間的複雜工作流，實現層次化的任務分配。
description_en: Orchestrates complex workflows between specialized sub-agents for hierarchical task allocation.

name: 數據分析工作流
description: 自動化原始數據集的清洗、統計建模與視覺化流水線。
description_en: Automates raw dataset cleaning, statistical modeling, and visualization pipelines.

name: 語義記憶增強器
description: 增強型 RAG 架構，用於長期知識保留與精確的向量檢索。
description_en: Enhanced RAG architecture for long-term knowledge retention and precise vector retrieval.

name: 系統協議執行官
description: 嚴格監控代理邏輯內的安全性協議與架構標準合規性。
description_en: Strictly monitors security protocols and architectural compliance within agent logic.

name: 潛在客戶自動開發
description: 透過社交與網路分析，自動識別並接觸高價值潛在客戶。
description_en: Automatically identifies and engages high-value leads through social and network analysis.

name: 社群內容流量引擎
description: 病毒式趨勢分析，自動生成平台特定的病毒式內容模組。
description_en: Viral trend analysis and automated generation of platform-specific viral content modules.

name: 測試套件架構師
description: 根據系統需求自動生成單元、集成與 E2E 測試案例。
description_en: Automatically generates unit, integration, and E2E test cases based on system requirements.

name: 威脅情報監控員
description: 持續掃描生態系統中的網絡安全漏洞與新興數位威脅。
description_en: Continuously scans for cybersecurity vulnerabilities and emerging digital threats within the ecosystem.

name: 視覺內容審計代理
description: 自動化 UI/UX 與視覺設計合規性檢查，具備多模態像素級分析能力。
description_en: Automates UI/UX and visual design compliance checks with multimodal pixel-level analysis.

name: 語音指令邏輯提取器
description: 優化口語輸入，將模糊的語音記錄轉化為精確的結構化執行指令。
description_en: Optimizes verbal input by converting fuzzy voice notes into precise structured execution commands.

name: PII 自動脫敏護欄
description: 在處理任務時自動識別並隱藏敏感個人資訊，確保 2026 年隱私法規合規性。
description_en: Automatically identifies and hides sensitive personal information to ensure 2026 privacy compliance.

name: 跨國合規執行包裹器
description: 內建全球主要法規邏輯標記，引導代理在合法邊界內執行任務。
description_en: Built-in regulatory logic markers for global standards, guiding agents within legal boundaries.

name: 法律條文精算師
description: 深度合約邏輯分析與風險模擬，提供法律層面的極限邊界測試。
description_en: Deep contract logic analysis and risk simulation for extreme legal boundary testing.

name: 醫學文獻與藥理綜述助手
description: 結合專業醫學數據庫邏輯，實現精準的生醫文獻綜述與數據對比。
description_en: Combines professional medical database logic for precise biomedical literature reviews and data comparison.

name: 意圖深度釐清器
description: 在指令模糊時主動生成假設性選項，透過高層次交互消除執行偏差。
description_en: Proactively generates hypothetical scenarios to eliminate execution bias when instructions are ambiguous.
